name: Fanwood Chow-Chow
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald the tomatoes and peel them.
2. Slice the peeled tomatoes.
3. Chop the onions.
4. Sprinkle the chopped onions with salt.
5. Let the mixture stand for 2 hours.
6. Drain any excess liquid from the tomatoes.
7. Add the chopped apples to the tomato-onion mixture.
8. Slowly boil the mixture for about 2 hours.
9. Stir in vinegar, brown sugar, mustard, red pepper, celery seed, cinnamon stick, and whole cloves.
10. If desired, add more salt to taste.
11. Simmer for an additional half hour.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
